payload.topic: Search Ads Strategy - Google Ads and Bing Ads Campaign Structure
payload.target_audience: B2B SaaS buyers searching for marketing automation solutions
payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE search ads strategy for AgenticMarketingPro. Include: 1) Google Ads campaign structure (Search, Display, Remarketing), 2) Bing Ads campaign structure, 3) Keyword bidding strategy (brand, competitor, category, long-tail), 4) Landing page recommendations for each ad group, 5) Budget allocation framework, 6) A/B testing protocol for ads and landing pages, 7) Conversion tracking setup, 8) ROAS targets and optimization playbook. Context: Target CMOs, VP Marketing, Growth leaders at 50-500 employee B2B SaaS companies.
